ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "source_title" TEXT /* Source title (e.g., journal name) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the publication */,
  "art_no" TEXT /* Article number */,
  "page_start" INTEGER /* Starting page number */,
  "page_end" INTEGER /* Ending page number */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Total number of pages */,
  "cited_by" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the publication */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Article, Review) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the publication (e.g., Scopus) */,
  "eid" TEXT /* Scopus ID or other identifier */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., submitted, accepted, published) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal or publication source */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the publication is open access */,
  "funding_acknowledgments" TEXT /* Funding acknowledgments for the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the publication is written */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Exact date of publication */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Copyright holder for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID for the author */,
  "academic_title" TEXT /* Academic title of the author (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's personal or professional website */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* Author's H-Index */,
  "scopus_author_id" TEXT /* Scopus ID for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order of authorship (e.g., 1 for the first author) */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the author's contribution to the publication */,
  "affiliation_at_publication" TEXT /* The affiliation of the author at the time of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-keyword relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the publication */,
  "keyword_weight" REAL /* A numerical value indicating the importance of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "parent_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent research area (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of research area (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_areas" (
  "pub_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-area relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* A numerical value indicating the relevance of the area to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_areas_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_areas_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding source and amount */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., grant, internal) */,
  "project_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the project (e.g., local, national, international) */,
  "project_objectives" TEXT /* Detailed objectives of the project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  "project_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the project */,
  "project_website" TEXT /* Website or link to the project page */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "co_investigators_ids" TEXT /* IDs of co-investigators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_publications" (
  "proj_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-publication relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "publication_role" TEXT /* Role of the publication in the project (e.g., primary, supporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_authors" (
  "proj_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-author relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Detailed role of the author in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_authors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citing_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing the work */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation is made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the citation (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., faculty, student, staff) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID for the user */,
  "user_scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus ID for the user */,
  "user_h_index" INTEGER /* User's H-Index */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_photo" TEXT /* URL to the user's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_proj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., PI, Co-PI, Researcher) */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's involvement in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's involvement in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_proj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_publications" (
  "user_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-publication relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., author, editor) */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the user's contribution to the publication */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_publications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., publication, project) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the resource */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
